/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libosgbCollision.a CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/BoundingCone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/BoundingCylinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/Chart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/CollectVerticesVisitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/CollisionShapes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/ComputeCylinderVisitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/ComputeShapeVisitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/ComputeTriMeshVisitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/GLDebugDrawer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/VertexAggOp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/Version.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/AbsoluteModelTransform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/GeometryOperation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/ReducerOp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osgbCollision.dir/GeometryModifier.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libosgbCollision.a
